trivia: The current production ATR is the world's default new turboprop: glass cockpit, 78 seats, and an order book that never seems to empty. Wherever runways are short and routes are thin, it appears.
IndiGo, Azul, and dozens of island carriers mean the -600 shows up on every continent's regional Dex.
funFacts: Represents the vast majority of new turboprop deliveries worldwide.
